mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{req.ifaOrderNo} IS NULL THEN IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_T_JP_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 10, '0') ELSE #{req.ifaOrderNo} END FROM DUAL
INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0208-04_1#Sql001 */ INTO T_JP_ORDER ( IFA_ORDER_NO ,IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO ,BUTEN_CODE ,ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,CUSTOMER_ID ,SPECIFIC_KBN ,BRAND_CD ,MARKET ,ORDER_STATUS ,TRADE_KBN ,QUANTITY ,LIMIT ,AZUKARI_KBN ,PAYMENT_LIMIT ,REPAYMENT_METHOD_TYPE ,REQUEST_TYPE ,ORDER_SYUBETSU ,ORDER_SYUBETSU_LIST ,KANYU_KBN ,JUTYU_KBN ,CHECK_INSIDER ,CHECK_SOR ,CHECK_COMP_WRN_ALERT ,SHIKIN_SEIKAKU_KBN ,USER_ID ,CANCEL_USER_ID ,TESUURYOU_KBN ,ALTER_FLG ,AUTO_ORDER_KIND ,RBE_ORDER_KIND ,SASINARI_KBN ,PRICE ,TRIGGER_ZONE ,TRIGGER_PRICE ,OCO_SASINARI_KBN ,OCO_SASHINE ,DONE_SASINARI_KBN ,DONE_SASHINE ,DONE_RBE_ORDER_KIND ,DONE_TRIGGER_ZONE ,DONE_TRIGGER_NEDAN ,DONE_OCO_SASINARI_KBN ,DONE_OCO_SASHINE ,DONE_LIMIT ,JO_ZEI_KBN ,ALTER_ORDER_NUM ,RBE_ORDER_STATUS ,ORDER_TYPE ,ORDER_NUM ,ACCEPT_DATE ,ACCEPT_TIME ,SHUBETU ,CODE ,MESSAGE ,ESTIMATE_PRICE ,AMOUNT ,COMMISSION ,CONSUMPTION_TAX ,CAPITAL_GAIN_TAX ,NET_AMOUNT ,COST ,TRADE_DATE ,SETTLEMENT_DATE ,ACCEPT_LIMIT ,DONE_ACCEPT_LIMIT ,COM_ID_R ,AC_POSITION ,AC_POSITION_AFTER ,AC_BALANCE ,AC_BALANCE_AFTER ,ORDERED_MARKET ,TRADE_DEFICIT_AMOUNT ,ISA_BUY_LIMIT ,JRNISA_TRANSFER_AMOUNT ,SOR_LINK_KBN ,UNCLOSED_QUANTITY ,UNCLOSED_QUANTITY_AFTER ,MARGIN_CAPABILITY ,MARGIN_CAPABILITY_AFTER ,ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE ,ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE_AFTER ,APP_INTEREST_RATES ,APP_LENDING_STOCK ,PREMIUM ,TPOINT ,TPOINT_AFTER ,DAILY_CREDIT_KBN ,PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE ,DATE_KBN ,BROKER_CODE ,INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD ,CREATE_TIME ,CREATE_USER ,UPDATE_TIME ,UPDATE_USER ,CCS_SEND_DATE ) VALUES( #{req.ifaOrderNo} ,#{req.ifaOrderSubNo} ,#{req.butenCode} ,#{req.accountNumber} ,#{req.kokyakuId} ,#{req.tokuteiKouzaKbn} ,#{req.brandCode} ,#{req.market} ,'2' ,#{req.tradeCd} ,#{req.quantity} ,#{req.yukoKigen} ,#{req.depositType} ,null ,null ,null ,#{req.orderKind} ,#{req.orderStatusListOrderClass} ,#{req.kanyuKbn} ,#{req.receiveOrder} ,#{req.checkInsider} ,#{req.checkSor} ,#{req.checkCompWrnAlert} ,#{req.uaiQaFundCharacter} ,#{req.userId} ,#{req.torikeshiUserId} ,#{req.tesuuryouKbn} ,#{req.teiseiKbn} ,#{req.autoOrderShubetsu} ,#{req.rbeChumonShubetsu} ,#{req.sashinariKbn} ,#{req.sashine} ,#{req.triggerZone} ,#{req.triggerNedan} ,#{req.ocoSasinariKbn} ,#{req.ocoSashine} ,#{req.doneSasinariKbn} ,#{req.doneSashine} ,#{req.doneRbeOrderKind} ,#{req.doneTriggerZone} ,#{req.doneTriggerNedan} ,#{req.doneOcoSasinariKbn} ,#{req.doneOcoSashine} ,#{req.doneYuukouKigen} ,#{req.joutoekizeiKbn} ,#{req.ec} ,#{req.rbeOrderStand} ,'S' ,#{req.ecOrderNo} ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,#{req.comIdR} ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,#{req.brokerCode} ,#{req.brokerChargeCode} ,IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,#{req.createUser} ,IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,#{req.updateUser} ,null )
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0208-04_1#Sql001sub */ IFA_ORDER_NO ,IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO ,BUTEN_CODE ,ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,CUSTOMER_ID AS KOKYAKU_ID ,SPECIFIC_KBN AS TOKUTEI_KOUZA_KBN ,BRAND_CD ,MARKET ,ORDER_STATUS ,TRADE_KBN AS TRADE_CD ,QUANTITY ,LIMIT AS YUKOKIGEN ,AZUKARI_KBN AS DEPOSIT_TYPE ,PAYMENT_LIMIT AS PAYMENT_DEADLINE ,REPAYMENT_METHOD_TYPE AS REPAY_METHID ,REQUEST_TYPE ASREPAY_ORDER ,ORDER_SYUBETSU AS ORDER_KIND ,ORDER_SYUBETSU_LIST AS ORDER_STATUS_LIST_ORDER_CLASS ,KANYU_KBN ,JUTYU_KBN AS RECEIVE_ORDER ,CHECK_INSIDER ,CHECK_SOR ,CHECK_COMP_WRN_ALERT ,SHIKIN_SEIKAKU_KBN AS UAI_QA_FUND_CHARACTER ,USER_ID ,CANCEL_USER_ID AS TORIKESHI_USER_ID ,TESUURYOU_KBN ,ALTER_FLG AS TEISEI_KBN ,AUTO_ORDER_KIND AS AUTO_ORDER_SHUBETSU ,RBE_ORDER_KIND AS RBE_CHUMON_SHUBETSU ,SASINARI_KBN ,PRICE AS SASHINE ,TRIGGER_ZONE ,TRIGGER_PRICE AS TRIGGER_NEDAN ,OCO_SASINARI_KBN ,OCO_SASHINE ,DONE_SASINARI_KBN ,DONE_SASHINE ,DONE_RBE_ORDER_KIND ,DONE_TRIGGER_ZONE ,DONE_TRIGGER_NEDAN ,DONE_OCO_SASINARI_KBN ,DONE_OCO_SASHINE ,DONE_LIMIT AS DONE_YUUKOU_KIGEN ,JO_ZEI_KBN AS JOUTOEKIZEI_KBN ,ALTER_ORDER_NUM AS EC ,RBE_ORDER_STATUS AS RBE_ORDER_STAND ,ORDER_TYPE AS SECURITY_TYPE ,ORDER_NUM AS EC_ORDER_NO ,ACCEPT_DATE AS ORDER_DATE ,ACCEPT_TIME AS ORDER_TIME ,SHUBETU ,CODE ,MESSAGE AS ERR_MESSAGE ,ESTIMATE_PRICE ,AMOUNT ,COMMISSION ,CONSUMPTION_TAX ,CAPITAL_GAIN_TAX ,NET_AMOUNT ,COST ,TRADE_DATE AS CONTRACT_DATE ,SETTLEMENT_DATE AS DELIVERY_DATE ,ACCEPT_LIMIT ,DONE_ACCEPT_LIMIT ,COM_ID_R ,AC_POSITION ,AC_POSITION_AFTER ,AC_BALANCE ,AC_BALANCE_AFTER ,ORDERED_MARKET ,TRADE_DEFICIT_AMOUNT ,ISA_BUY_LIMIT ,JRNISA_TRANSFER_AMOUNT ,SOR_LINK_KBN ,UNCLOSED_QUANTITY ,UNCLOSED_QUANTITY_AFTER ,MARGIN_CAPABILITY ,MARGIN_CAPABILITY_AFTER ,ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE AS RATE ,ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE_AFTER ,APP_INTEREST_RATES AS APPLICABLE_INTEREST_RATE ,APP_LENDING_STOCK AS APPLICABLE_STOCK_LENDING_FEES ,PREMIUM ,TPOINT ,TPOINT_AFTER ,BROKER_CODE ,INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD AS BROKER_CHARGE_CODE ,CREATE_TIME ,CREATE_USER ,UPDATE_TIME ,UPDATE_USER ,CCS_SEND_DATE AS CCS_DATE FROM T_JP_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NUM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.ecOrderNo}) AND BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCEPT_DATE >= SUBSTR(#{req.orderDate}, 1, 8) AND IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = ( SELECT MAX(IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO) FROM T_JP_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NUM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.ecOrderNo}) AND BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCEPT_DATE >= SUBSTR(#{req.orderDate}, 1, 8) )
mapper.update: UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0208-04_1#Sql002 */ T_JP_ORDER SET UPDATE_TIME = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,UPDATE_USER = #{req.updateUser} ,ACCEPT_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') WHERE IFA_ORDER_NO = TO_NUMBER(#{req.ifaOrderNo}) AND IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = TO_NUMBER(#{req.ifaOrderSubNo})
